title: app.opengrep-rules.python.flask.security.open-redirect
description: Data from request is passed to redirect(). This is an open redirect and could be exploited. Consider using 'url_for()' to generate links to known locations. If you must use a URL to unknown pages, consider using 'urlparse()' or similar and checking if the 'netloc' property is the same as your site's host name. See the references for more information.
cwe_ids: CWE-601: URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')
owasp_categories: A01:2021 - Broken Access Control, A01:2025 - Broken Access Control

title: app.opengrep-rules.javascript.lang.correctness.missing-template-string-indicator
description: This looks like a JavaScript template string. Are you missing a '$' in front of '{...}'?
code_excerpt:
const REDEEM_SCRIPT = `
  local key          = KEYS[1]
  local userId       = ARGV[1]
  local now          = tonumber(ARGV[2])
  local orderTotal   = tonumber(ARGV[3])

  if redis.call('EXISTS', key) == 0 then
    return {0, 'INVALID_CODE'}
  end

  if redis.call('HGET', key, 'used') == '1' then
    return {0, 'ALREADY_USED'}
  end

  local expiresAt = redis.call('HGET', key, 'expiresAt')
  if expiresAt ~= false and expiresAt ~= '' and tonumber(expiresAt) < now then
    return {0, 'EXPIRED'}
  end

  redis.call('HSET', key, 'used', '1', 'usedBy', userId, 'usedAt', now)

  local discountType  = redis.call('HGET', key, 'discountType')
  local discountValue = tonumber(redis.call('HGET', key, 'discountValue'))

  local discount = 0
  if discountType == 'percent' then
    discount = math.floor(orderTotal * discountValue / 100)
  else
    discount = discountValue
  end
  if discount > orderTotal then
    discount = orderTotal
  end

  return {1, tostring(discount)}
`;

title: app.opengrep-rules.python.sqlalchemy.security.sqlalchemy-execute-raw-query
description: Avoiding SQL string concatenation: untrusted input concatenated with raw SQL query can result in SQL Injection. In order to execute raw query safely, prepared statement should be used. SQLAlchemy provides TextualSQL to easily used prepared statement with named parameters. For complex SQL composition, use SQL Expression Language or Schema Definition Language. In most cases, SQLAlchemy ORM will be a better option.
cwe_ids: CWE-89: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')
owasp_categories: A01:2017 - Injection, A03:2021 - Injection, A05:2025 - Injection
